CodeSnippet.title: Code Snippet
CodeSnippet.description: A shared or saved code snippet, optionally a fork of another snippet

title.description: Optional title for the code snippet

expiresAt.description: Timestamp when this snippet expires (createdAt + 30 days)

parentCodeId.description: Document ID of original snippet if this is a fork

tags.description: Custom tags added to the snippet

ownerId.description: UID of the user who owns this snippet, if saved while logged in

ownerName.description: Display name of the user who owns this snippet

activeEditorUid.description: UID of the guest or user actively locking this snippet for typing

activeEditorName.description: Display name of the active editor

activeEditorExpires.description: Epoch timestamp in ms when the active typing lock expires

User.title: User
User.description: Stores user profile information, verified on signUp/in

geminiApiKey.description: User's personal Gemini API key for running code helper and corrections

Presence.title: Presence
Presence.description: Tracks a collaborator currently viewing the same snippet room

snippets/{snippetId}.description: Storage for all shared code snippets

snippets/{snippetId}/presence/{presenceI.description: Real-time presence of users inside a room
